title: c00lgui
body:
# c00lgui
Adds a way to evade things such as fights or find caves easier (or you could just use it as an elevator)

## Modes
c00lgui has 4 modes that are not too hard to master
### Normal:
Normal teleports the player randomly around a 100 block radius with about 5 seconds of a delay
### Inverse:
Inverse saves the location you teleported from and brings you back to said location
### Up:
As the name suggests this mode teleports you up, However it needs a block directly above you to teleport above, may or may not be changed in the future
### Down:
Like the previous mode except it teleports you Down instead of Up.

### How to use
To use c00lgui simply look anywhere and right click, To change modes use sneak + right click 

pretty simple, yes?
